description.value:
Benefit: Whenever you suffer damage, you become enraged. Whilst enraged, you take a -2 penalty to Armor Class and cannot make Intelligence, Wisdom or Charisma-based skill checks. You will stay in this enraged state for 1d4 rounds or until the thing that caused the damage is defeated.

Gain: Taking this flaw grants you one bonus feat.
